memory.summary: Midterm is tomorrow, and I'm only 60% ready; going out now would be a dumb risk to my grade. My team wants me, but the test outcome matters way more than tonight.
Midterm prep is finally at 78%, but I'm still drained. Mina's last call for the club feels like a wasted chance, yet my grades are the only thing that actually matters right now.
Midterm prep hit 89% in just an hour, but my energy is tanking. I need to stop now before burnout ruins tomorrow's performance.
I crushed the final prep, hitting 98% readiness for tomorrow's exam. Even with my energy tanking and sleep debt piling up, that grade is secured.
The exam started exactly when my prep finished, but that 98% coverage means I'm locked in. My energy is perfect now, so the grade is mine regardless of the stress.

desires: Secure the A+ on tomorrow's exam without any last-minute hiccups, as that grade is the only metric that validates my effort.
Immediately discard the 'club' obligation from my schedule because attending now would be a waste of time and an unnecessary social tax.
Leverage my high energy right now to aggressively tackle low-priority tasks like laundry, treating them as obstacles to clear before I can relax.
Avoid any further emotional entanglement or negotiation with friends who want me to go out, as their needs are irrelevant to my primary achievement.

goals.description: Immediately execute the exam. The preparation phase is over; my goal is now pure performance and securing the A+.
goals.rationale: My achievement axis demands the result, not the process. I have 0.98 progress but missed the study deadline. Pushing to 'finish' studying is a waste of cognitive resources now. The assertive/impulsive mix dictates I cut the planning phase and dive straight into the execution phase to maximize the grade.

goals.description: Ignore all social notifications regarding the club invitation until after the exam results are posted.
goals.rationale: Social interaction has zero ROI right now. My short planning horizon ignores future relationship maintenance in favor of immediate academic dominance. Assertiveness means shutting down these requests without negotiation or guilt.

goals.description: Defer laundry completely. It is a non-essential distraction that consumes time needed for post-exam recovery or future tasks.
goals.rationale: Despite having high energy (10.0), using it on chores is an inefficient allocation of resources. Laundry can wait until Sunday; failing the exam cannot be fixed by clean clothes. My impulsive nature prefers to clear the path to the finish line first.

agent.last_reasoning: The exam deadline has passed; the preparation phase is over. Working on 'exam_prep' now yields zero ROI and wastes cognitive resources. My goal is pure performance during execution, not studying. I will wait for the exam to start rather than attend a low-ROI social event or do chores.

goals.description: Execute a forced, high-intensity 2-hour study block immediately to bridge the gap from 60% to 85% preparedness for tomorrow's 9am midterm.
goals.rationale: My value system prioritizes academic outcomes (0.5) over relationships (0.15). The risk of failure is too high if I stop now; short-term pleasure (clubbing) is worthless compared to validating my competence. I need to eliminate the anxiety of being underprepared by brute-forcing the remaining material.

goals.description: Directly reject Mina and Jae's invitation in the group chat with zero ambiguity: 'No, I'm studying. Have fun.' Do not engage in further negotiation or guilt-tripping.
goals.rationale: I am assertive and impulsive. My focus is non-negotiable right now. Engaging in social pleasantries or explaining myself further is a waste of energy that threatens my study momentum. I will set the boundary hard and move on.

Laundry has a soft deadline far in the future. Spending time on it now would dilute my focus on the immediate high-stakes exam. It fits my tendency to ignore low-value tasks when a high-value one demands attention.

desires: Secure a top grade on tomorrow's midterm to validate my academic competence, even if it means disappointing the team tonight.
Immediately shut down social pressure from Mina and Jae to go out, asserting that my focus is non-negotiable right now.
